per_question.question: According to the 2025 10-K filing, what sector does General Electric (GE) operate in?
In the 2025 10-K, what recent major corporate separations did General Electric complete, and what risks do they mention as associated with these spin-offs?
Describe two geopolitical or global macro risks mentioned in GE's 2025 10-K filing that could negatively impact its business.
According to the 2025 10-K filing, what are two technological advances or trends that GE highlights as risk factors in its business environment?
What climate change related risks does GE identify in its 2025 10-K filing that could affect its financial performance? Provide at least two specific examples.
How many Home Depot stores did Home Depot Inc. operate at the end of fiscal 2025 and in which geographical regions?
What was the total capital expenditure by Home Depot Inc. in fiscal 2025 and what strategic areas did these investments support?
Which two major acquisitions by SRS are mentioned in the 2026 Home Depot 10-K, and what business areas do they expand for Home Depot?
How did Home Depot Inc. return value to shareholders in fiscal 2025, and what change was made to the quarterly cash dividend?
What AI-powered digital tools did Home Depot implement to enhance the shopping experience as described in the 2026 10-K filing?
According to Alphabet Inc.'s 2026 10-K, who is the CEO of both Alphabet and Google as of the report's filing?
What is the name of Alphabet Inc.'s seventh-generation custom-built Tensor Processing Unit (TPU) mentioned in the 2026 10-K?
As of December 31, 2025, how many employees did Alphabet Inc. report having, according to the 2026 10-K?
What is the name of Alphabet Inc.'s most intelligent AI model as described in the 2026 10-K, and what key capability does it provide?
In 2025, what percentage of Alphabet Inc.'s total revenues came from online advertising, according to Risk Factors in the 2026 10-K?
How many total employees did Sherwin-Williams have worldwide as of December 31, 2021, according to the 2022 10-K?
What are the three reportable operating segments of Sherwin-Williams as stated in the 2022 10-K filing?
Which segment of Sherwin-Williams incurred the majority of capital expenditures for ongoing environmental compliance measures in 2021, as discussed in the 2022 10-K?
List three major trademarks or trade names used by the Performance Coatings Group segment of Sherwin-Williams, as identified in the 2022 10-K.
In the 2022 10-K, how did Sherwin-Williams describe the seasonality of its Reportable Segments' sales, and how does this affect inventory management?
